summary: Portfolio health remains mixed with persistent deployment issues. Chief-scout continues to fail deployments while director stays completely stalled. However, most active projects show strong acceleration, with head-of-product resolving some blocking TODOs and soft-power maintaining rapid development pace.

soft-power.one_liner: Strong acceleration continues with 26 commits this week, still needs CI/CD

director.one_liner: Remains completely stalled with zero commits for 30+ days

chief-scout.one_liner: Development slowing down with persistent failing deployments
